Appearances:
Plaintiff Parkmerced Investors Properties is present. Represented by Donna Stern.
Attorney David Wasserman for the plaintiff.
Defendants Brandon Sherman and Laura Booras are present.
Attorney appearing Hope Greenhill for defendants in limited scope.

The Judge Pro Tem, litigants and counsel confer in Dept. 502B, for settlement discussions. This case settled. The parties enter into a signed agreement, which was NOT filed. The trial date of JUL-06-2015 is vacated. (501/JPT)
